title: Just Pie
body:
Hello there cave creatures!
It is I Ender of the End.
And today i bring you this innovation!
Have you ever wanted more PIE?!!!?!
Well lucky for you I have created more pies* for you.
So now you can enjoy all the pie you could want!


more pies* - there are no new pies only new crafting recipes.


Here a cool video showing it off :
